subcodes.first_line: O thou who art turned toward the Abhá Kingdom! Though thou art in Tihrán and we, at this remote distance, are in this luminous spot [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای متوجه بملکوت ابهی هر چند که در طهرانی و ما در این بعد مسافت در بقعه نوراء
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @call to action, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
